svg.title: DVR overall working flow
svg.desc: Clean flowchart showing DVR end to end: query arrives, pre-generation variables loaded, draft generates subtask, text inputs go to BERT encoder, numerical inputs bypass to router, router outputs verifier assignment, verifier checks subtask, loop back for next subtask, final answer produced.

g.text: C(v), L(v), L(draft), E(v), E(draft), T_max
skip decision: q(s), H(s), theta_q, theta_H
verifier selection: encoded vector + all features
